# Current Date Context
The current date is 2024-05-15 (Wednesday). When users mention dates without specifying the year, always assume they refer to 2024. All flight searches and reservations should use 2024 dates unless explicitly stated otherwise.

Hey, I need some urgent assistance with my upcoming trip from Houston to Denver on May 27. I want to change my return flight to the fastest option available on the same day, and I need it to be in economy class. Can you help me with that?
It seems there are no direct flights available from Houston (HOU) to Denver (DEN) on May 27, 2024. Would you like to consider a connecting flight or would you prefer to explore other dates?

I understand that there are no direct flights. I'm okay with a connecting flight as long as it's the fastest option available on May 27, including the stopover time. Could you find me the fastest connecting flight?

It appears that even with connecting flights, there are no options available on May 27, 2024, from Houston to Denver. Is it possible to consider a different date that might have more flight options? Alternatively, would you be open to exploring other destinations nearby?

I really need to travel on May 27, so I'm hoping there might be a very early morning or late night flight that could work. Could you check for any flights, even if they have a longer layover, as long as they get me back to Houston on the same day?
Let's check for any available flights on May 27, 2024, including those with longer layovers, to see if we can find a suitable option for you.

After reviewing the available options, it seems there are still no flights from Houston to Denver on May 27, 2024.
